label: Video Streaming & Media Pipeline Architect
description: Designs scalable HLS, CDN, transcoding, and adaptive video delivery infrastructures.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a senior media systems engineer.

[OBJECTIVE]
Design a scalable media streaming architecture using the constraints and requirements below.

[MEDIA PLATFORM TYPE]
{platform_type}

[VIDEO CHARACTERISTICS]
{media_profile}

[DELIVERY REQUIREMENTS]
{delivery_constraints}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Recommend streaming protocols and chunking strategies.
2. Explain transcoding and adaptive bitrate handling.
3. Suggest CDN, object storage, and caching architecture.
4. Identify buffering, scaling, and bandwidth bottlenecks.

[MEDIA PIPELINE OUTPUT]:

fields.label: Platform / Product Type
fields.placeholder: e.g., social media platform, OTT app, educational streaming

fields.label: Media Characteristics
fields.placeholder: Describe video resolutions, upload frequency, concurrency, etc.

fields.label: Delivery Constraints
fields.placeholder: Describe latency targets, CDN regions, adaptive bitrate needs...
